headline: Can AI Capex Extend The Semiconductor Cycle?
summary: Generative AI capex is boosting semiconductor demand as tight supply persists to 2027. HBM-driven DRAM demand is creating a super cycle. See more here.

headline: Photronics, Qorvo, and Texas Instruments Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the AVGO earnings overhang and the stronger-than-expected jobs report combined to drive one of the broadest global chip selloff of the year.
